name: Zhang Zhang
page_title: Zhang Zhang 張璋 [Han] – Romance of the Three Kingdoms Encyclopedia – Kongming’s Archives
historical_notes:
After He Jin was killed by the eunuchs in AD 189, Zhang Zhang, who served as one of his officers, led his troops to attack the place and slaughter them. (1)

1) HHS 69/59:2252 (via. A Biographical Dictionary of Later Han to the Three Kingdoms, by Dr. Rafe de Crespigny).

full_text:
Zhang Zhang 張璋
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zhang Zhang (張璋). Officer under He Jin. Led troops to slaughter the eunuchs after his death. Zhang Zhang was affiliated with the Han Dynasty.
